close_reason: Fixed in commit 28e4703 (add Debug impls across all backend structs)
description:
secretx-aws-sm/src/lib.rs:38 declares 'pub struct AwsSmBackend' without a #[derive(Debug)]. All three fields (Arc<Client>, String, Option<String>) implement Debug, so a derive is trivial.

Rust API guidelines (C-DEBUG) recommend Debug on all public types unless there is a specific reason not to. This crate is the public surface for an AWS Secrets Manager backend; a downstream caller debugging a misrouted secret cannot dbg!(&backend) the constructed object today.

Cross-reference: crate-secretsx-ojwd flagged the same finding for AwsKmsBackend. Fix both in the same sweep.

Fix:

    #[derive(Debug)]
    pub struct AwsSmBackend {
        client: Arc<aws_sdk_secretsmanager::Client>,
        name: String,
        field: Option<String>,
    }

aws_sdk_secretsmanager::Client implements Debug (verified in aws-sdk-secretsmanager 1.104), so the auto-derive will work without a manual impl. The Debug output of Client elides credentials by design.
title: secretx-aws-sm: AwsSmBackend missing #[derive(Debug)]
